post.headline: Check message headers during review
post.subtext: Email Validation helps recipients inspect DKIM, SPF, DMARC, and signing-key records before follow-up or team handoff.
post.image_alt_text: A mobile Hush Line social asset showing the Tools page with the Email Validation tab selected, a raw email headers field, and buttons to validate headers or download a report.

social.bluesky:
Email headers can help a recipient understand how a message reached them.

Hush Line's Email Validation tool checks DKIM, SPF, DMARC, and signing-key records so teams have a clearer record during review.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.
social.linkedin:
When a tip comes in by email, the headers can help a recipient understand what path the message took.

Hush Line's Email Validation tool lets recipients paste raw headers and review DKIM, SPF, DMARC, and signing-key records from DNS. It gives journalists, lawyers, security teams, and other trusted recipients a clearer record for follow-up and team handoffs.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.
social.mastodon:
Email headers can help a recipient understand how a message reached them.

Hush Line's Email Validation tool lets journalists, lawyers, security teams, and other trusted recipients check DKIM, SPF, DMARC, and signing-key records during review.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.

post.rationale: Selected the mobile Email Validation screenshot because notifications and encryption appeared more recently in the archive, including this week. This recipient-shared tool is grounded in review workflows for journalists, lawyers, security teams, and other trusted recipients, and the copy avoids admin framing, release timing, and PR references.
post.copy_brief: Write for recipients and staff using Hush Line day to day, not for platform admins.
